author: deepak.rao
message: perf: reuse sync.Pool for buffers in encoder
diff:
@@ pkg/codec/pool.go @@
+var bufPool = sync.Pool{New: func() any { return new(bytes.Buffer) }}
 	b := bufPool.Get().(*bytes.Buffer)
+	defer bufPool.Put(b)

author: ivan.petrov
message: chore(gateway): tidy auth middleware error responses
diff:
@@ services/gateway/middleware/auth.go @@
 	if err := verifier.Validate(tok, claims); err != nil {
-		http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
+		w.Header().Set("WWW-Authenticate", "Bearer")
+		http.Error(w, `{"error":"unauthorized"}`, http.StatusUnauthorized)
 		return
 	}

author: marta.kowalski
message: fix(order): correct tax rounding for EU VAT
diff:
@@ services/order/tax.go @@
-	return math.Round(net * rate)
+	return math.Round(net*rate*100) / 100
